title: ReputationDimension
description: A community-authored, context-local axis of reputation in the Neighbourhoods sense. Each neighbourhood defines its own dimensions and scores them over members' acts and works; dimensions are subjective by design and are never normalized into a single global score. The optional latticeBinding is the keystone of portability: when present, it expresses the dimension in the IdentitySpine's shared vocabulary (a gate or an inner axis), which makes capital earned under this dimension partially legible across neighbourhoods — portable MEANING, not just portable data. Without a binding the dimension remains opaque to foreign neighbourhoods. A dimension scores WORKS only and carries no field able to reference a subject's given identity inputs.

id.description: Stable URN identifier for this dimension.

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the contract this document conforms to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the dimension was authored.

dimensionId.description: Neighbourhood-local dimension name; globally unique together with neighbourhoodId.

neighbourhoodId.description: The community that authored and computes this dimension.

description.description: What this dimension measures, in the community's own terms.

range.description: The measurement range. Subjective and community-defined.

computedOver.description: Which evidence the dimension scores. Points at works on the existing evidence fabric — WORKS only, never identity inputs.

receiptKinds.description: Receipt kinds (e.g. reasoning-receipt) whose works count toward this dimension.

subjective.description: Reputation is subjective and context-local. Never collapse dimensions across neighbourhoods into one score. Always true.

latticeBinding.description: Optional join into the IdentitySpine vocabulary. Its presence is what makes the dimension portable across neighbourhoods.

target.description: The gate or inner axis this dimension binds to.

mapping.description: How the dimension's range maps onto the spine target.

confidence.description: Whether the binding was declared by the community or inferred.

travelsWithHolder.description: The dimension's values travel with the agent, not the app. Always true.

foreignReadableIf.description: A foreign neighbourhood may interpret this dimension only when a latticeBinding is present; otherwise it is opaque.
